creator: never@mile.nevermind.kiev.ua
text:
According to ${PORTSDIR}/x11/XFree86-4/pkg-comment we have X11R6.4,
	but according to ${PORTSDIR}/x11/XFree86-4/work/xc/Makefile we 
	actually have X11R6.5

How-To-Repeat: 	cd /usr/ports/x11/XFree86-4
	make patch
	grep ^RELEASE work/xs/Makefile
	cat pkg-comment

	compare results of grep and cat
